heading: What clients say after the edit is delivered.

items.quote: Ero works with us for several video edits now and we can say he is really efficient and effective in terms of creativity. Highly recommended for upcoming projects.
items.name: Lunchbox PH

items.quote: Merwin's edits completely transformed our short-form pipeline. The retention rates on his cuts are insane, and he actually understands the pacing needed to clear the algorithm.
items.name: Alex R.

items.quote: He didn't just deliver the trailer on a tight deadline, he optimized it perfectly for TikTok. The video organically hit over 3 million views in less than a week.
items.name: Sarah J.

items.quote: Hands down the most reliable content operator I've worked with. Running the calendar and handling the raw assets from start to finish took a massive load off our team.
items.name: David M.
